info.title: Parsio API
info.description: Parsio is an AI-powered document and email parser that extracts structured data from PDFs, emails, spreadsheets, and other documents. The API allows you to programmatically manage mailboxes, upload documents for parsing, retrieve parsed data, and configure webhooks for real-time data delivery.

get.description: Retrieves a list of all mailboxes in your account.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start date filter (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End date filter (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.description: Search query

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by document status (parsed, fail, skipped, new, quota, parsing, exception)
